top_risk: Agent runtime false-positive reporting and tool-call timeout handling
recommended_actions: Investigate T-1003 immediately: trace agent-runtime task lifecycle to determine why success is reported before artifact write completes. Add post-task artifact verification.
Fix T-1005 tool-call timeout handling: ensure unknown-state tasks are surfaced to operators with explicit error context rather than silent failure.
Address T-1001 auth issue for pilot-bank-a as high-priority — the authentication reset flow blocks tenant admin operations for 42+ minutes.
